title: Demi Moore Wins Golden Globe Best Actress For Comedy or Musical
text: Demi Moore Wins Golden Globe for Best Actress in a Musical or Comedy. Demi Moore claimed the Golden Globe for Best Female Actor in a Comedy or Musical for her role in 'The Substance' at the 82nd Annual Golden Globes on January 5, 2025. Her Acceptance Speech: Moore delivered an emotional acceptance speech that resonated with the audience. She reflected on being told decades earlier that she was merely a 'popcorn actress' and that she accepted this limitation. She explained that a few years ago, she believed her career had concluded until receiving the script for 'The Substance.' 'The universe told me you're not done,' Moore shared, describing the film as a 'magical bold courageous out of the box absolutely bonkers' project. She concluded her remarks by addressing feelings of inadequacy, noting that someone once told her 'you will never be enough.' However, Moore reframed her perspective, stating that by setting aside self-judgment, she could recognize her accomplishments. The Competition: Moore defeated several notable nominees, including Mikey Madison ('Anora'), Cynthia Erivo ('Wicked'), Zendaya ('Challengers'), Amy Adams ('Nightbitch'), and Karla Sofia Gascon ('Emilia Pérez'). This marked 'The Substance's' first win of the evening.
